result.prompt: Transport the scene to a snowy mountain village, with consistent atmospheric perspective, snow accumulation on existing surfaces, and cold-tone lighting shift
Change all visible text to Japanese: the shop sign, the menu board, and the poster in the window, matching each surface's font style and perspective distortion

result.prompt: Add a parked bicycle with its shadow on the cobblestones, chain lock visible, leaning against the lamppost in the midground
Replace the still water with a flowing stream: add motion blur, adjust all reflections to show elongated distortion, add foam at rock edges, and shift the reflected sky coloring
Turn 1: Remove all people | Turn 2: Change setting to abandoned/overgrown | Turn 3: Add a single deer standing in the doorway | Turn 4: Make it foggy dawn with muted colors
Add heavy rain with wet reflections on all surfaces, darkened sky, puddles forming on the ground, and rain streaks consistent with a strong crosswind from the left
Age the person by 30 years: add wrinkles, grey hair, slight posture change, while preserving their identity and the clothing style
Rotate the camera viewpoint 45 degrees to the right, revealing the side of the building and adjusting all perspective lines and shadows consistently
Replace the sedan with a vintage 1960s convertible in matching color, preserving the parking angle, ground shadow, and license plate text
Convert all metal surfaces to weathered copper with green patina, matching the existing light reflections
Remove the bridge from the scene, naturally extending the river and its reflections of the treeline

Transform the background into a cozy snowy mountain village with wooden chalets and distant snow-covered peaks, using strong atmospheric perspective so distant elements fade into cool mist. Add realistic snow accumulation on the ground, grass, trees, buildings, and paved areas. Shift overall lighting and color grading to a cold, crisp winter tone. Keep the woman’s pose, expression, and framing unchanged, but dress her in a modest black winter coat, long pants, and boots.

Replace all visible text in the scene with Japanese while preserving the original fonts, sizes, and perspective distortion. On the shop sign, write "安全用品店". On the menu board, write "本日のおすすめ" with multiple shorter lines as needed. On the window poster, write "自転車レーンに注意". Keep all other visual elements, colors, objects, lighting, and composition completely unchanged.

Convert the entire scene into a traditional Ukiyo-e woodblock print style while preserving the existing composition, camera angle, and all objects: worker on the left, crane and hanging stone in the center, stacked pipes and wire coil in the foreground, rocks and sea in the background. Use flat color areas, bold black outlines, and stylized Japanese wave patterns in the water. Keep all structural details and proportions unchanged.

Add a single classic metal lamppost in the midground, slightly right of center, emerging from a small cobblestone patch that replaces only the immediate ground around its base. Lean a parked city bicycle against the lamppost with a clearly visible chain lock wrapped around the post. Ensure the bicycle and lamppost cast consistent, directional shadows on the cobblestones. Preserve the person, wildflowers, rolling hills, sky, and overall natural lighting and color palette unchanged.

Transform the glossy floor area into a shallow, natural flowing stream running from the bottom center toward the background, with subtle motion blur indicating water movement. Add scattered rocks along the stream edges and create small patches of white foam where water meets rocks. Adjust all existing reflections in the water surface to appear elongated and slightly distorted, with a cooler bluish sky tint. Keep sculptures, architecture, lighting, and perspective unchanged.

Remove all four people completely and reconstruct the scene as the same interior space now abandoned and decayed, with broken shelves, peeling walls and overgrown plants creeping across floor and walls. Transform the area behind them into a large open doorway at center background. Add a single realistic deer standing calmly in this doorway. Change lighting to soft foggy dawn with cool, muted colors, keeping original camera angle and composition otherwise unchanged.

Add a heavy rainstorm effect across the entire scene, with dense, diagonal rain streaks blown strongly from left to right in front of the man. Darken the background to resemble an overcast, rainy sky while keeping the man’s pose, expression, and clothing unchanged. Make the floor wet and reflective with realistic puddles forming near his feet, and add subtle wet sheen and reflections on all visible surfaces.

Age all three people in the image by approximately 30 years while clearly preserving each person’s facial identity, hairstyle shapes, and current formal clothing style. Add realistic age lines, wrinkles, mild sagging skin, and slightly grayer or salt-and-pepper hair. Give the standing woman a subtly more stooped posture, and the two seated men slightly older but natural posture. Leave their tuxedos, dress, jewelry, table setting, background, lighting, and overall scene unchanged.

Rotate the virtual camera viewpoint about 45 degrees to the right around the dinner table, keeping all seven people, the dog, and the full spread of food visible, but now showing more of the right wall, photos, and background while slightly reducing the visible area of the left side. Adjust all perspective lines, table edges, chairs, and wall decorations to match the new angle, preserving existing lighting, colors, facial expressions, and overall cozy indoor atmosphere.

If there is a sedan parked on the road in this scene, replace only that car with a vintage 1960s convertible in the exact same color, parking angle, scale, and position. Preserve the original car’s ground shadow shape, reflection behavior, and keep the license plate text exactly unchanged. Do not alter the woman, her clothing, bag, the dirt road, or any buildings, trees, poles, or sky in the background.

Convert every visible metal surface in the image—including the woman’s sunglasses frames, lamp posts, railings, and any metal fixtures in the background—into weathered copper with a natural green patina, preserving existing highlights, reflections, and shadow directions. Maintain original shapes, gloss level, and small details of each object. Leave the woman’s clothing, skin, hair, shoes, pavement, plants, buildings, and overall lighting, colors, and composition completely unchanged.

Remove the entire wooden bridge structure, including railings, supports, and metal beam, and reconstruct a continuous natural river flowing through the middle of the scene. Replace the bridge area with realistic water, riverbed stones, and matching reflections of the treeline and sky, aligned with existing perspective and current flow. Keep the man, his pose, clothing, backpack, foreground gravel, grassy banks, and distant trees completely unchanged.
